testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: [public void io.cucumber.testng.AbstractTestNGCucumberTests.runScenario(io.cucumber.testng.PickleWrapper,io.cucumber.testng.FeatureWrapper)] has no parameters defined but was found to be using a data provider (either explicitly specified or inherited from class level annotation). Data provider mismatch Method: runScenario([io.cucumber.testng.PickleWrapper arg0, io.cucumber.testng.FeatureWrapper arg1]) Arguments: [(io.cucumber.testng.PickleWrapperImpl) "Login with mobilenumber",(io.cucumber.testng.FeatureWrapperImpl) "login functionality",null]
